Bug / Task Description: EWFlag merge must preserve the enable-wins CRDT guarantee under concurrent enable and disable operations. Merging a replica that disabled without observing a local enable dot must not clear that dot; only causally observed enable dots may be removed. Fix the merge rule so both merge orders converge to enabled for concurrent enable-vs-disable, observed disables still clear the flag, and repeated/idempotent merges remain stable. Keep the exported EWFlag API and value semantics unchanged.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): enable-wins flag merge must not drop local enable dots
